title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at BikeDekho Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at BikeDekho Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the BikeDekho Advisory Limited family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Varanasi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About BikeDekho Advisory Limited:
BikeDekho Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Google Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BikeDekho Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
